{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/46104176?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/shakevsky", "id": 46104176, "login": "shakevsky", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjQ2MTA0MTc2", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/shakevsky", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41486", "cvss": {"score": null, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 8.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:4.0/AV:N/AC:L/AT:P/PR:N/UI:A/VC:H/VI:H/VA:H/SC:H/SI:H/SA:H"}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-94", "name": "Improper Control of Generation of Code ('Code Injection')"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-502", "name": "Deserialization of Untrusted Data"}], "description": "Ray Data registers custom Arrow extension types (`ray.data.arrow_tensor`, `ray.data.arrow_tensor_v2`, `ray.data.arrow_variable_shaped_tensor`) globally in PyArrow. When PyArrow reads a Parquet file containing one of these extension types, it calls `__arrow_ext_deserialize__` on the field's metadata bytes. Ray's implementation passes these bytes directly to `cloudpickle.loads()`, achieving arbitrary code execution during schema parsing, before any row data is read.

In May 2024, Ray fixed a related vulnerability in `PyExtensionType`-based extension types ([issue #41314](https://github.com/ray-project/ray/issues/41314), [PR #45084](https://github.com/ray-project/ray/pull/45084)). In July 2025, [PR #54831](https://github.com/ray-project/ray/pull/54831) introduced `cloudpickle.loads()` into the replacement extension types' deserialization path, reintroducing the same class of vulnerability.

## Impact

- **Affected versions**: Ray 2.49.0 through 2.54.0 (latest release as of March 2026). The vulnerable `_deserialize_with_fallback` function with `cloudpickle.loads()` was introduced in commit `f6d21db1a4` ([PR #54831](https://github.com/ray-project/ray/pull/54831), July 2025), first released in Ray 2.49.0.
- **Affected configurations**: Any process that uses Ray Data and reads Parquet files. The extension types are registered globally in PyArrow, so all Parquet reads in the process are affected, including `ray.data.read_parquet()`, `pyarrow.parquet.read_table()`, `pandas.read_parquet()`, etc.
- **Attacker prerequisites**: The attacker must place a crafted Parquet file where a Ray Data pipeline reads it. No authentication or cluster access is required. The Parquet file must contain a column with a `ray.data.arrow_tensor` (or v2, or variable-shaped) extension type name, which makes this a targeted attack against Ray Data users.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00473, "percentile": 0.37504}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-04-24T16:15:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41486"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-08T22:16:29Z", "published_at": "2026-04-24T16:15:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/ray-project/ray/security/advisories/GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r", "https://github.com/ray-project/ray/pull/54831", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-41486", "https://github.com/ray-project/ray/pull/62056", "https://github.com/ray-project/ray/commit/c02bd31ae31996805868baa446a131a8d304525f", "https://github.com/ray-project/ray/releases/tag/ray-2.55.0", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/ray-project/ray/security-advisories/GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/ray-project/ray", "summary": "Ray: Remote Code Execution via Parquet Arrow Extension Type Deserialization", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-13T13:37:52Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-mw35-8rx3-xf9r", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.55.0", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "ray"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 2.49.0, < 2.55.0"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: Ray: Remote Code Execution via Parquet Arrow Extension Type Deserialization
